title: Evaluate BLE IPSP versus NUS SLIP for T-Deck IP local link
description: Evaluate whether the LilyGO T-Deck Zephyr firmware should expose IP/CoAP local-client traffic over standards-based BLE IPSP/6LoWPAN, BLE NUS carrying SLIP-framed IPv6 as a practical equivalent, or both. Current T-Deck config keeps NUS/SLIP disabled because BLE egress is not wired and the board must not advertise an incomplete local-client service. Acceptance: decision recorded with Zephyr ESP32-S3 support evidence, native app impact, UUID/advertising behavior, and follow-up implementation Beads for any selected unsupported transport.
